title: Attackers Targeted Injective NPM Package to Steal Wallet Keys
dek: Attackers attempted to compromise an Injective NPM package with malware designed to steal wallet keys, according to Cointelegraph. The supply-chain attack targeted Injective developer tooling. Apps and users could face risk if the package is unpatched.
author: Crypto Cronkite
key_fact: A supply-chain attack targeted an Injective NPM package with malware intended to steal wallet keys.
body: Hackers attempted to backdoor an Injective NPM package with malware designed to steal wallet keys, according to Cointelegraph.
The supply-chain attack targeted Injective developer tooling, posing a direct risk to apps and users if the package is left unpatched.
Developers relying on the affected tooling are the primary population exposed.
